programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Supercharged
programme.desc: This is Sport - Racing Category.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and others join Kitty when she decides to go on an adventurous surfing trip, however, they come across unexpected challenges.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Miss katkar gives responsibility to Honey, Bunny and team to look after the ripe mangoes on tree. Later, they encounter a naughty monkey eating those mangoes.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and their friends get into trouble when they end up in a rat's burrow while trying to catch a mischievous mouse.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Bunny mistakenly gets an egg instead of a ball while playing football. Later, everyone is taken aback when the egg starts cracking.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes Shin-chan with her to see a movie. However, at the theatre, Shin-chan annoys everyone and consequently, he and Misae are asked to leave.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Kazama-chan is dining whilst his mother apprises him of the importance of good hygiene. Afterwards, he gets scolded by his mother who assumes he is wasting time instead of studying.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After reading the morning newspaper, Hiroshi finds an advertisement for a ramen store offering affordable rates. Consequently, he suggests a trip there to Misae.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Jujo-san fantasises about being an ace police detective who wastes no bullets to apprehend criminals. However, her senior raises her from her day dreams and encourages her to return to work.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After summoning Shin-chan to take his clothes for washing, Misae asks him to separate his garments to prevent them from entangling in the washing machine.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After returning from a shopping trip, Misae reminds Shin-chan to wash his hands first. Later, Shin-chan mischievously eats his cereal, making a fuss.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae is awakened from sleep by Musae for the television broadcast of a football match. However, Misae is annoyed for her sister's petty reasons behind ruining her sleep.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: On a hot summer day, Shin-chan pesters Misae to purchase an ice crusher for him. However, he eats too much of it and suffers a stomachache.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Shin-chan's father hands him an autograph of Mizuyama Tsuyoshi, he is unimpressed. However, his mother Misae is left excited by it.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Misae struggles to wear a skirt, Shin-chan suggests that she has gained weight. As a result, Misae decides to lose weight whilst Shin-chan mocks her resolution.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi plans to train Shin-chan to become a baseball player. However, on the day of training, he forgets Shin-chan and takes Shiro with him instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Masumi Ageo tries to discreetly discuss with Ume Matsuzaka about a planned meeting that she feels skeptical about attending.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans on preparing a meal for Hiroshi's client but she forgets a few ingredients. As a result, she instructs Shin-chan to fetch them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his friends are left enthralled by the sight of a stag beetle. Afterwards, Masao-chan apprises them that it was caught by his father in Yamanashi Prefecture.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Jack and Oggy win the lottery, but one of the cockroaches gets hold of the winning ticket.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy joins Jack for a calm day of fishing that quickly turns chaotic when Dee Dee sneaks along. Jack locks horns with a stubborn fish, while Dee Dee repeatedly steals bait and lunch.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Jack decides to redo the front of Oggy's house, but things become chaotic when the cockroaches manage to get hold of his tools.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: After Oggy manages to get rid of the cockroaches, he finds himself in peaceful and serene surroundings, but he starts to feel dull a few moments later.

programme.title: Shin chan - Dangerous Family Holiday
programme.desc: Mitsy surprises the Nohara family with a trip to Australia. Upon their arrival, Harry gets abducted, leaving the others to rescue him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and Masao are requested by Takeshi to take him to Masao's house. However, Shin-chan takes him to his house instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi and Misae take Shin-chan and Himawari on a trip to Kumamoto in the company of Koyama who appears to be lacking in excitement.

programme.title: Shin Chan: Mr. smelly's ambition
programme.desc: Shin-chan and the Nohara family travel back in time to stop Kasukabe's villain and his notorious gang from carrying out their evil mission.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: The kids are tense as nobody remembers Sunday except them. Later, Nokili Pari tries to erase the day from the memory of the kids, while Baalveer fights Bhayankar Pari at Asmani Parvat.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: The kids are tense as nobody remembers Sunday except them. Nokili Pari tries to erase the day from the memory of the kids, while Baalveer fights Bhayankar Pari at Asmani Parvat.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Builder Kancha Cheena strikes a deal with politicians for the Mumbai parks. As a result, the parks are kept closed and this upsets the kids. Baalveer decides to solve this issue and save the parks.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Builder Kancha Cheena strikes a deal with politicians for the Mumbai parks. As a result, the parks are kept closed and this upsets the kids. Baalveer decides to solve this issue and save the parks.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Builder Kancha Cheena strikes a deal with politicians for the Mumbai parks. As a result, the parks are kept closed and this upsets the kids. Baalveer decides to solve this issue and save the parks.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal boards an autorickshaw to get to work, but the vehicle breaks down mid-way. Later, Popatlal bumps into a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal falls in love with the woman on the bicycle and calls his friends to tell them about her. However, he fails to get her name or number.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal falls in love with the woman on the bicycle and calls his friends to tell them about her. However, he fails to get her name or number.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Popatlal stands on the street in the rain, he meets the love of his life a second time. He proposes to her and is surprised when she says yes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal meets Champaklal and seeks his blessing before meeting the love of his life at the same location where they met last time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal goes to a road crossing in the middle of the rain to sell 'chana'. A group of children see this and crowd around him to buy his product.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham hear about Popatlal's financial worries and pity him. They wish there were something they could do to stop him from selling 'chana'.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On Daya's suggestion, Tapu Sena join Popatlal to search for Miss Tring-Tring. Later, everyone offers their help to Popatlal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal orders Nattu Kaka and Bagha to search for Miss Tring-Tring around the shop and give them the descriptions of her bicycle to identify her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal informs Daya that Popatlal has finally met Miss Tring-Tring. Later, Popatlal and Miss Tring-Tring spend time with each other.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal goes to a traffic signal in Powder Gully to wait for Miss Tring-Tring. However, he somehow gets into trouble before she even arrives.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal desperately waits for Miss Tring-Tring and vows to meet her at any cost. However, she does not arrive.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A group of thugs chase Popatlal and Miss Tring-Tring on their vehicles. Fortunately, the couple manage to hide from them and ultimately get rescued.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the gangsters prepare to shoot him, Popatlal stops them and begs them to reconsider their decision. Later. Popatlal asks the thugs to let Kiran go.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham celebrate Popatlal's bravery in getting the drug gang arrested. Afterwards, a television producer meets Popatlal to honour him for his actions.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: While celebrating his daughter's 20th birthday, a businessman receives a threat. Soon, the CID team is called to investigate the death of his daughter, who dies in a blast.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: During Raksha Bandhan, Deepika is found dead at Raja's mansion. Later, when the CID investigates, they unravel some dark facts from the past.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is concerned about the low turnout at Gada Electronics. Soon, he begins having a meltdown in front of Bagha and Nattu Kaka.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the residents excitedly head to Gada Electronics together. However, the store is overcrowded, leaving them anxious about the fate of their coupons.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal welcomes the residents of Gokuldham Society to his store. However, he discovers that Babita will not be coming.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal panics when he witnesses Inspector Pandey walking into Gada Electronics. Later, Popatlal claims that the scheme is fake.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu informs Jethalal and Champaklal about the lucky draw results. In the meantime, the residents discuss what they would do if they win the car.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With the arrival of the letter, Popatlal dreams of meeting numerous prospective brides. On the other hand, Babita thanks Jethalal for helping her to win the car.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham gather for the announcement of the lucky draw results. In the meantime, Popatlal is hell-bent on proving that the scheme is fake.

programme.title: Kaun Banega Crorepati
programme.desc: Host Amitabh Bachchan asks a series of questions to several contestants to test their general knowledge and give them a chance to win a cash prize.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi suggests boiled food for Jethalal and tells Daya to be more careful with his diet for now. The Gadas meet up with famous dancers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu wants a new season cricket bat. Later, he tries to come up with different and unique ways to convince his parents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu learns that Bhide is not allowing Sonu to go out and play. Later, an argument takes place between Jethalal and Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pyaarelal decides to change his name back to Popatlal and talks to Sapna's father. Sapna starts to feel close to him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sapna and Popatlal enjoy their time together and find themselves getting along well. Popatlal learns that he has another scheduled meeting with Kalpana.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal has a private conversation with Kalpana, but he finds himself in a predicament when both women agree to marry him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal puts himself in a difficult position after agreeing to both Kalpana and Sapna's marriage proposals.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal is pushed by Champaklal to make a final choice for his marriage, making him decide to turn to Tapu Sena for advice on his dilemma.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal meets both families again to come to a decision, but Sapna's family make him feel unexpectedly uncomfortable.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal lies to Sapna about having to attend to a work emergency, but his real intention is to visit Kalpana instead.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gopu Sena from 7 Star Society challenges Tapu Sena that their Ganesh Chaturthi event will win the award. Meanwhile, Bhide disagrees to provide funds to Tapu Sena for this event.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After a bank refuses a loan request, Tapu Sena approaches a moneylender to facilitate their event. Later, they have to pay a high price for it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena finally unveils the Ganpati decorations, and everyone is breathless by the setup. Meanwhile, They also have a second surprise to reveal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Rita is impressed and delighted by Tapu Sena's Ganesh Chaturthi event. She experiences the magic in this event and decides to promote it through her news channel.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All members of Gokuldham society pay their respects to Lord Ganesha. Later, everyone is excited to receive delightful gifts.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Kids from the 7 Star Society are shocked to see the number of visitors in Gokuldham society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Ganesh Chaturthi event in Gokuldham becomes a crowd-puller, and everyone pitches in to handle the long queues of visitors.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham society wins the best Ganesh Chaturthi event award. Everyone is excited to hear the news.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena is shocked when they find the donated money collected at the Ganpati event is empty. They decide to catch the thief by checking the CCTV footage and soon find something suspicious.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena realises the folly of spending money that could use to help someone who is in need. Later, they apologise to everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is happy with the success of Tapu Sena's Ganpati decorations. They are also pleased when Tapu Sena gives them each a memorable gift as a token of thanks.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is upset and angry with everyone in society. Later, Madhavi asks him about the reason. He tells her that all members try to make fun of him for being the secretary.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All of the members go on a trip to visit Mumbai's famous Shree Siddhivinayak Ganapati Temple. Meanwhile, Bhide announces a surprise that he plans for everyone. He also apologises for the day before.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members of the society return home to another surprise from Bhide. However, a new problem suddenly arises.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Panic arrives when Jethalal loses his house key, and everyone in the society helps him find the key. All of the members are tired, but they still cannot find the keys.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members feel restless when Bhide is unable to find a key maker. Later, Taarak says that they should go and search for the bus.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of the Gokuldham Society set out to look for the key, but the rest of the members feel restless.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When the men return without the key, everyone is disappointed. They eventually find the key from somewhere unexpected.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Seeing his mother's tears, Tapu plots revenge on his father. This family conflict embroils Jethalal in chaos, leaving him worried about Tapu's behaviour.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: While Genda holds Haseena and Karishma hostage, DSP Anubhav searches for them. Later, Haseena and Karishma manage to turn the tables on Genda.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: After bringing Haseena home, Karishma goes to great lengths to ensure that Haseena stays awake while Anubhav Singh tries to find an antidote. However, Haseena struggles to survive.

programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Crime Patrol 2.0

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Chakranarayan and Kulkarni join hands once again. Later, Chakranarayan and Kulkarni plan on using one of Sai's devotee's perjurious statement against him.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Chakranarayan and Kulkarni manipulate Prathmesh into getting his hands dirty and do their work by making him believe that they are Sai's devotees and disciples.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: After Kulkarni learns that Prathamesh failed in his task, he comes up with an even peculiar plan to implicate and frame Sai.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
